data.title: Cute Guinea Pig Portrait Crewneck Sweatshirt | Small Chest Print
data.description:
Soft, lightweight, and quietly charming — this crewneck brings a little warmth and personality to slow mornings and casual afternoons. The small, hand-illustrated guinea pig portrait sits over the heart, a gentle nod to anyone who knows the comfort of small animal companionship. Wear it with jeans for neighborhood walks, layered over pajamas on cool evenings, or folded into your travel bag for visits to friends and family. The relaxed fit and breathable cotton let it move with you, while the subtle design keeps the focus on comfort and connection.

Product features
- 100% ring-spun cotton for a smooth, strong print surface
- Lightweight fabric (6.4 oz/yd²) with a relaxed fit
- 1x1 ribbed cuffs and hem retain shape after wear
- Tubular, side-seam-free knit for a cleaner look and less waste
- Twill shoulder and neck tape for added stability and comfort

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Do not bleach
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Iron, steam or dry: low heat
- Do not dryclean

data.title: Guinea Pig Portrait Tee | Cute Pet Circle Graphic T-Shirt
data.description:
This relaxed boxy tee carries a small, hand-illustrated guinea pig portrait over the heart — gentle, cozy, and quietly playful. The soft, midweight cotton feels lived-in from the first wear while the dropped shoulders and roomy cut let you move without fuss. It’s the kind of shirt you reach for when you want comfort and a subtle nod to your pet-love: easy to layer for morning walks to the park, long afternoons of reading at a café, or casual meetups with fellow small-animal fans. The tear-away label and durable double-stitched hems mean it stands up to everyday wear and frequent washing, staying soft and true to shape. If you care about tactile comfort and low-key personality in your wardrobe, this tee settles into that space — calm, familiar, and quietly affectionate.

Product features
- 100% airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (solid colors) for a soft, smooth hand
- Medium-weight fabric (6.0 oz/yd² / 170 g/m²) — substantial yet breathable
- Relaxed boxy fit with dropped shoulders for an easy, roomy silhouette
- Durable double-needle stitching at sleeve, neck and hem for long-lasting wear
- Tear-away label for itch-free comfort

Care instructions
- Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
- Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
- Tumble dry: low heat
- Iron, steam or dry: low heat
- Do not dryclean
